scope: root wrapper/config/audit shell manifest repair only; no candidate backend mutation, no feature work, no deploy/release, no cloud-dev, no generated-build expansion

failure_before.command: python3 scripts/amof.py promote-main --repo amof --ticket-id UP9-13 --candidate-branch feat/UP9-13 --source-sha <repos/amof HEAD> --expected-main-sha <repos/amof origin/main> --dry-run
failure_before.cause: clean root origin/main contained ecosystems/amof-platform/audit but no ecosystems/amof-platform/ecosystem.yaml, so load_manifest('amof-platform') could not resolve the manifest before promote-main validation.

repair_decision.chosen: restore minimal root ecosystem manifest presence
repair_decision.reason: root is wrapper/config/audit shell; ecosystem.yaml is workspace configuration, not product implementation truth. promote-main needs repo path mapping to canonical repos/amof.
not_chosen: teaching promote-main to special-case amof-platform without a manifest

expected_after.promote_main_dry_run: passes validation from root clean baseline
